text:
was an employee of the Reeves Company.

Story

Royal Government arc

Dan is one of two employees that accompany Dimo Reeves when he turns over Eren Yeager and Historia Reiss to the Military Police Brigade. When the MPs arrive, they kill Reeves and his employees, and take the two captives.

Trivia

Dan is a Hebrew name meaning "to judge".
